allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -match "node"} | Stop-Process -Force 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess; if \($?\) { Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object Name, Id })
PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -eq "node"} | Select-Object Name, Id, CommandLine)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; $attempts = 0; while \($attempts -lt 3\) { try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "✓ Page loaded!"; break } catch { Write-Host "Attempt $\($attempts + 1\): Still compiling..."; $attempts++ ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $attempts = 0; while \($attempts -lt 5\) { try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "✓ Signin page loaded successfully!"; if \($response.Content -match 'Welcome Back'\) { Write-Host "✓ Page contains welcome message" }; break } catch { Write-Host "Attempt $\($attempts + 1\)/5: Waiting for dev server..."; $attempts++; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 } }; if \($attempts -eq 5\) { Write-Host "Dev server still starting..." })

PowerShell(try { $resp1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; $resp2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=partner" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "✓ Customer signin page: $\(if \($resp1.Content -match 'Customer Login'\) {'WORKING'} else {'check'}\)"; Write-Host "✓ Partner signin page: $\(if \($resp2.Content -match 'Partner Login'\) {'WORKING'} else {'check'}\)"; Write-Host "✓ Both pages loaded successfully!" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 5 2>&1; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content length: $\($response.Content.Length\)" } catch { $err = $_.Exception.Response; if \($err\) { Write-Host "Status Code: $\($err.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Status Description: $\($err.StatusDescription\)" } else { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $content = $response.Content; if \($content -match 'meta http-equiv="refresh"'\) { Write-Host "Found meta refresh redirect"; $content | Select-String -Pattern 'meta http-equiv' } elseif \($content -match 'Welcome Back'\) { Write-Host "✓ Signin page content found"; Write-Host "Page title: $\(if \($content -match '<title>\([^<]+\)</title>'\) { $matches[1] }\)" } else { Write-Host "⚠ Unexpected content"; Write-Host "First 500 chars: $\($content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $content.Length\)\)\)" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/auth/signin?role=customer" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $content = $response.Content; Write-Host "Customer Login badge: $\(if \($content -match 'Customer Login'\) {'✓ FOUND'} else {'✗ NOT FOUND'}\)"; Write-Host "Welcome Back text: $\(if \($content -match 'Welcome Back'\) {'✓ FOUND'} else {'✗ NOT FOUND'}\)"; Write-Host "Email input: $\(if \($content -match 'Email Address' -or $content -match 'type="email"'\) {'✓ FOUND'} else {'✗ NOT FOUND'}\)")
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix sidebar layout to expand page content when collapsed *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Make page content expand dynamically with sidebar using CSS variables *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add story type support: weddings, engagements, bridal showers *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Enhance story card with functional Edit and Delete options *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix authorization for story edit and delete - allow createdBy partners *)
